callGraph.callee:
pluginCandidates
        .filter((plugin): plugin is PluginCatalogItem => plugin !== null)
        .sort

selectedSessions
    .flatMap((session) =>
      input.deps
        .getTraceSteps(session.id)
        .filter((step) => step.isError || step.status === 'error')
        .map((step) => ({
          sessionId: session.id,
          step,
        }))
    )
    .sort((a, b) => b.step.timestamp - a.step.timestamp)
    .slice(0, MAX_DIAGNOSTIC_ERROR_STEPS)
    .map

selectedSessions
    .flatMap((session) =>
      input.deps
        .getTraceSteps(session.id)
        .filter((step) => step.isError || step.status === 'error')
        .map((step) => ({
          sessionId: session.id,
          step,
        }))
    )
    .sort((a, b) => b.step.timestamp - a.step.timestamp)
    .slice

selectedSessions
    .flatMap((session) =>
      input.deps
        .getTraceSteps(session.id)
        .filter((step) => step.isError || step.status === 'error')
        .map((step) => ({
          sessionId: session.id,
          step,
        }))
    )
    .sort

steps
    .filter(s => s.toolName?.startsWith('mcp__'))
    .map(s => s.toolName!)
    .filter((name, index, self) => self.indexOf(name) === index)
    .filter

contentBlocks
      .filter((block) => block.type === 'text')
      .map((block) => (block as { type: 'text'; text: string }).text)
      .join
